description: Enhanced real-time order tracking with visual timeline component, rider ETA countdown, and rider info card
steps: Create components/tracking/order-timeline.tsx - Visual step-by-step timeline component with icons for each order status (ORDER_RECEIVED, ACCEPTED, PACKING, READY_FOR_DELIVERY, OUT_FOR_DELIVERY, ARRIVING, DELIVERED). Current step highlighted with pulse animation. Completed steps show checkmark. Uses framer-motion for enter animations. Shows timestamp for each completed step from statusEvents array.

Enhance components/tracking/live-order-tracking.tsx - Replace the existing inline TRACKING_STEPS timeline with the new OrderTimeline component. Add rider info card enhancement: when OUT_FOR_DELIVERY status, show rider name, phone with tap-to-call button, and distance-based ETA countdown that updates as rider location changes. Add a pulsing 'arriving' indicator when distance < 500m.
acceptance_criteria: components/tracking/order-timeline.tsx renders a full 7-step timeline with icons
Current step has pulse animation, completed steps show checkmarks
Each completed step shows its timestamp from statusEvents
Rider info card shows name and phone with call button when OUT_FOR_DELIVERY
ETA countdown updates based on rider location changes
Component uses framer-motion springs from lib/motion.ts
verification: Run npx eslint . from apps/web/ and confirm no errors
Run npm run test from apps/web/ and confirm all existing tests still pass
